name: Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
Combine first five ingredients in a large bowl. Add egg and milk, stirring just until dry ingredients are moistened.
Let batter stand for 5 minutes.
Carefully drop batter by rounded tablespoonfuls into deep hot oil (375 degrees).
Fry, turning once, for 3 to 5 minutes or until hush puppies are golden brown.
Drain well on paper towels. Yield: about 1-1/2 dozen.
